arabic: وعن عبد الله بن زيد رضى الله عنه قال‏:‏ أتانا النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم، فأخرجنا له ماء في نور من صفر فتوضأ‏.‏‏‏((‏رواه البخارى‏)‏‏)‏‏

english.narrator: 'Abdullah bin Zaid (May Allah be pleased with him) reported:
english.text: The Prophet (ﷺ) visited us and we brought water for him in a brass vessel for his ablution and he performed ablution..

chapter.english: The Book About the Etiquette of Eating
